scripts.name: Adaptive Agility Runner
scripts.description: Runs agility course laps through normal bridge gameplay, records per-step evidence, learns faster obstacle variants, and can stop at a target Agility level.

scripts.name: Adaptive Mining Runner
scripts.description: Discovers cache-backed mine clusters, routes between banks and rocks, chooses the best live ore target, mines with primitive find_nearest_rock plus interact_object loops by default, keeps legacy mining-tool fallback for old runtimes, banks ores for Mining training, and logs run-policy plus route-batch run-efficiency diagnostics.

scripts.name: Adaptive Fletching Runner
scripts.description: Runs normal-gameplay woodcutting and fletching loops with primitive-first tree object interaction, knife-on-log fletching, and interface-button make-all clicks, legacy fallback for old runtimes, bird nest pickup/banking, product selling, run enabling, quiet progress, and JSONL evidence.

scripts.name: Primitive Woodcutting Runner
scripts.description: Runs standalone woodcutting through primitive find_nearest_tree, interact_object, wait_until_idle, route, bank, and bird-nest pickup steps without using Java woodcutting batch tools.

scripts.name: Cowhide Combat Runner
scripts.description: Runs tight normal-gameplay cow combat for MrFlame-style early melee training: stays local inside the Lumbridge cow pen while reachable cows exist, handles the timed cow-pen gate transition, uses short fight/drop polling for fast Cowhide pickup, banks hides at Al Kharid through the compact bank-loadout policy, buys/eats kebabs as needed, can buy/equip Mithril scimitar when Attack allows, records JSONL evidence, exposes cooperative --status/--request-stop control files, and currently uses legacy route_runner.py compatibility paths only for real travel legs.

scripts.name: Bank Loadout Helper
scripts.description: Applies compact primitive-backed bank loadout policies from observed inventory so scripts do not repeatedly deposit the same item; includes a cowhide-trip preset for banking hides and the spare iron scimitar while keeping three kebabs and 100 coins.

scripts.name: Primitive Combat Runner
scripts.description: Runs generic combat training or target killing from external script logic using set_combat_style, find_training_npc, attack_npc, wait_until_idle, eat_best_food, optional looting, and optional route targets instead of Java train_combat or durable combat goal strategy.

scripts.name: Primitive Food Runner
scripts.description: Runs fishing, cooking, fish-then-cook, or firemaking through interact_npc, use_item_on_object, use_item_on_item, click_interface_button, and wait_until_idle instead of Java fish_food, cook_food, or light_fire strategy tools.

scripts.name: Catherby Food Runner
scripts.description: Runs Catherby fish, cook, drop-burnt, and bank cycles with proven local shore/range/bank fast paths plus ML1 fallback, Catherby south range-house door handling, fishing-spot reacquisition, level-aware method selection (shrimp, rod+bait sardine/herring, shrimp/anchovies, tuna, lobster, tuna/swordfish), Catherby fishing-shop supply buying, progress checks, compact bank policy deposits, cooperative status/stop controls, passive-trace efficiency reporting, and stale-runtime cook_food fallback only when primitive cooking makes no progress.

scripts.name: Catherby Food Runner XS
scripts.description: Extra-slim status/control wrapper for the Catherby fish/cook/bank runner. Combines cooperative status and passive-trace efficiency into one compact JSON response; delegates request-stop/clear-stop safely.

scripts.name: Runner Status XS
scripts.description: Compact status reader for cooperative gameplay runners. For Catherby food runs it reports state, reason, player, stop files, route evidence path, and passive-trace efficiency without touching the live game.

scripts.name: Food Bank XS
scripts.description: Compact food, bank, equipment, and inventory summary for cooking, fishing, banking, and combat-prep decisions without loading a full observe_state payload.

scripts.name: Object Search XS
scripts.description: Compact object search wrapper. On failed object lookup it returns nearby object candidates so agents can adjust name, id, or reachability without a full observation.

scripts.name: Primitive Smithing Runner
scripts.description: Runs smelting and smithing externally using object interaction, item-on-object, interface-button smelting, interface-item smithing selection, wait_until_idle, and SmithingData parsing instead of Java smelt_bar, smith_item, smith_best_item, plan_smithing, or train_smithing_profit strategy calls.
examples: python3 agent-navigation/tools/script_registry.py run smithing -- --mode smelt --bar bronze --quiet

scripts.name: ML1 Route Definition
scripts.description: Preferred ML1 route API for normal A-to-B routing. Returns compact routeSteps, runPlan/runSegments, safety review fields, persisted route-definition artifacts, and feedback commands. Use define before live travel; bare route_runner.py is deprecated for normal agent routing.
examples: python3 agent-navigation/tools/script_registry.py run ml1 -- define --from X,Y,H --to PLACE --combat-level N --food N --run-energy N --run-enabled
python3 agent-navigation/ml-routing/route_ml.py define --from X,Y,H --to PLACE --combat-level N --food N --run-energy N --run-enabled

scripts.name: ML1 Route Step Executor
scripts.description: Executes a persisted ML1 route definition by following routeSteps through normal bridge walk primitives, eating at a safer default HP threshold, observing nearby NPC context on combat or HP loss, and writing route_batch plus route_outcome evidence for future ML exports.

scripts.name: Route Failure XS
scripts.description: Compact reader for ML1 route executor evidence. Reports latest route outcome, last batch, combat/death/HP-loss failures, final tile, and route evidence path without loading full executor logs.

scripts.name: Route Runner (Deprecated)
scripts.description: Deprecated standalone route method. Keep for legacy diagnostics and compatibility executor checks only; normal agent routing should use ML1 route_ml.py define and follow routeSteps.
examples: python3 agent-navigation/tools/script_registry.py run legacy-route -- --to ardougne --orient --json --run-reserve auto

scripts.name: Marathon Runner
scripts.description: Runs repeated route/exploration laps with route-eval preflight and suspicious-detour context maps.

scripts.name: Runtime Doctor
scripts.description: Checks, restarts, claims, verifies, and inspects the local server/client/bridge runtime without printing bridge tokens.

scripts.name: Agent Session XS
scripts.description: Compact latest/current agent-session log reader. Summarizes top tools, recent outcomes, failures, current player state, and log paths without loading large JSONL or Markdown files into context.

scripts.name: Server Tick Report
scripts.description: Summarizes recent /tmp/2006scape-server.log cycle-duration warnings, sampled slow cycles, and tick health in compact JSON without restarting or touching the live JVM.

scripts.name: Map Grid API
scripts.description: Converts level-0 world tiles to 32-tile reference grid cells, returns cell bounds, and lists grid cells visible in bounded maps.

scripts.name: Agent Context Map
scripts.description: Renders bounded current-location, grid-cell, or route-segment cache maps with nearby markers, the level-0 reference grid, and machine-readable JSON summaries.

scripts.name: Active Map Refresher
scripts.description: Starts, stops, restarts, and inspects the background worker that keeps the three canonical active map PNGs current: Mr. Flame, Heat Map, and Mr. Flame Fog.

scripts.name: Mr. Flame Map
scripts.description: Renders the active profile movement map with latest movement traces, cache icons, labels, run tinting, death sites, and current-position marker.

scripts.name: Heat Map
scripts.description: Renders the active movement heat map with latest traces and full-resolution cached coverage density.

scripts.name: Mr. Flame Fog
scripts.description: Renders the active fog-of-war movement map with latest traces, dark unexplored context, and POIs hidden outside explored coverage.

scripts.name: Character Memory
scripts.description: Reads and writes sparse profile-scoped long-term memories and goals for a selected character without mixing MrFlame, MrGem, or other profiles.
examples: python3 agent-navigation/tools/script_registry.py run character-memory -- show --profile MrFlame --json
python3 agent-navigation/tools/character_memory.py goal --profile MrFlame --priority normal --tags gear --text "Upgrade from a bronze axe when the character has enough coins and shop access."

scripts.name: Navigation Database CLI
scripts.description: Validates and queries navigation places, routes, hazards, passive traces, coverage, and route graph summaries.
